opinion.h1: ROSENGARD v. CITY OF BOSTON, 355 U.S. 272 (1957)
opinion.h4: ROSENGARD ET AL. v. CITY OF BOSTON ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME JUDICIAL COURT OF MASSACHUSETTS. No. 566. Decided December 16, 1957.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
J. Edward Keefe, Jr. for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
